ICN.Settings.Menu.Name: IC notification settings
ICN.Settings.Menu.Label: Configure IC notifications
ICN.Settings.Menu.Hint: Choose world defaults or your personal IC chat sounds, volumes, and character-name detection.
ICN.Settings.SceneRule.Title: Same-scene only
ICN.Settings.SceneRule.Hint: Messages from other scenes never play a sound. This safety rule is always active.
ICN.Settings.Enabled.Name: Enable IC chat sounds
ICN.Settings.Enabled.Hint: Play a sound for incoming IC messages from your currently viewed scene. Your own messages remain silent.
ICN.Settings.Enabled.ShortHint: Only incoming IC messages from your current scene.
ICN.Settings.UseWorldSounds.Name: Use the GM's world sounds
ICN.Settings.UseWorldSounds.Hint: When enabled, the GM's normal and mention sounds are used. Disable it to use your personal sounds below.
ICN.Settings.WorldGroupHint: These sounds and volumes are the default for every player who has enabled the GM world sounds option.
ICN.Settings.WorldNormalSound.Name: World normal IC sound
ICN.Settings.WorldNormalSound.Hint: The GM-defined default sound for regular incoming IC messages.
ICN.Settings.WorldNormalVolume.Name: World normal volume
ICN.Settings.WorldNormalVolume.Hint: The GM-defined default volume for regular incoming IC messages.
ICN.Settings.WorldMentionSound.Name: World mention sound
ICN.Settings.WorldMentionSound.Hint: The GM-defined default sound for IC messages addressed to a player.
ICN.Settings.WorldMentionVolume.Name: World mention volume
ICN.Settings.WorldMentionVolume.Hint: The GM-defined default volume for IC messages addressed to a player.
ICN.Settings.PersonalSoundHint: Used only when the GM world sounds option is disabled.
ICN.Settings.PersonalMentionHint: The personal mention sound below is used only when the GM world sounds option is disabled.
ICN.Settings.NormalSound.Name: Normal IC sound
ICN.Settings.NormalSound.Hint: The sound played for a regular incoming IC message.
ICN.Settings.NormalVolume.Name: Normal IC volume
ICN.Settings.NormalVolume.Hint: Volume for regular incoming IC messages.
ICN.Settings.MentionEnabled.Name: Use a distinct mention sound
ICN.Settings.MentionEnabled.Hint: Use the mention sound when an IC message names your user or character, or is an IC whisper addressed to you.
ICN.Settings.MentionEnabled.ShortHint: A stronger sound when the message is meant for you.
ICN.Settings.MentionMode.Name: Name detection
ICN.Settings.MentionMode.Hint: Choose whether both Alaric and @Alaric count as mentions, or require the @ sign.
ICN.Settings.Aliases.Name: Additional names
ICN.Settings.Aliases.Hint: Optional comma-separated names that should trigger your mention sound, for example: Alaric, Lord Alaric.
ICN.Settings.MentionSound.Name: Mention sound
ICN.Settings.MentionSound.Hint: The distinct sound played when an incoming IC message is addressed to you.
ICN.Settings.MentionVolume.Name: Mention volume
ICN.Settings.MentionVolume.Hint: Volume for IC messages addressed to you.
